scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n gw,dx,crm,att,ctr,chat,rag,web "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:saas-dx" "npm run dev:saas-crm" "npm run dev:saas-attendance" "npm run dev:saas-contract" "npm run dev:saas-chat" "npm run dev:saas-rag" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:monolith: concurrently -k -n api,web "tsx scripts/run-go-service.ts server --monolith" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.docker:build: docker compose build saas-image api web
scripts.docker:up: docker compose build saas-image api web && docker compose up -d
scripts.docker:up:8080: docker compose build saas-image api web && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:GATEWAY_HOST_PORT='8080'; docker compose up -d"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:scripts && npm run typecheck:web
